text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Vodka were a great
success. We've had a lot of adventures along the
way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might be unreasonable, reckless, and
impulsive... but she's a true legend. And her story
doesn't end here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I want your help with something, Trainer. It might
sound a little crazy though...
choice_data_list: Sure thing. I'm used to your brand of crazy.
Sure thing. I'm used to your brand of crazy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Don't you even want to hear what it is before you
agree?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Either way, thanks, partner. This'll be
quick. What I wanna ask ya is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree to her request. We begin constructing
something in an unused corner of the Tracen
Academy grounds. Soon after...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's this? This wasn't here last week.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Is this a special track?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Awww yeahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Trainer... This track really is tough.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The turf's really hard on your knees, and it eats
away your stamina in seconds.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka? What are you two doing?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And what on earth is this track?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any idea just where you are right
now?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Of course...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We're at the edge of Tracen Academy. That much
is obvious.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Tsk, tsk, tsk. Wrong.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is Europe, and this here's a European track.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Or at least, it's based on one. Either way, you
can't call it Tracen Academy anymore.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A European track?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're right! The turf is completely different.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Did you plant all this? What in the world for?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You should at least be able to guess that one. It's
to get ready to run internationally.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta make up for that blunder after the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So you made a special track just for that?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Are you stupid?! This is not normal behavior!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Who cares what's normal?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's me you're talkin' to! You know how I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So, does this mean you two dummies are off to
observe races abroad?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Callin' us dummies is a bit much, don't ya think?
We're gonna learn a whole bunch over there!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I've gotta work my way to the next peak.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But why do you need to go there? You're not
suited for Europe at all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You just need to win in Japan where your edge
really shines, right? So why?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm goin' exactly because I'm not suited for it. Because everyone thinks I'll lose.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten a lot stronger. I might even be part of
the domestic top class. But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What's the point of pickin' fights you know you'll
win? That's not challenging yourself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Once you get stronger, ya gotta keep lookin' for
stronger opponents. Life is all about aimin'
higher!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Plus, people who keep lookin' for a challenge are
cool. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is able to kick common sense to the curb
just so she can stay true to herself as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure that she'll keep on pushing fearlessly
forward like this for the foreseeable future.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I'm off, Scarlet! Make sure you're stronger
by the time I get back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm off to check things out abroad and amaze the
world.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has become a famous Umamusume in her
own way. But when people talk about her, they
don't talk about what she went through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They just talk about how she's the coolest
Umamusume there ever was.
